response.justification: Bogdan brings 16+ years of broad engineering experience with strong alignment to the primary stack — TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, Docker, AWS — and is currently working on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks at re:cinq, which directly matches the AI agent development requirement. His TDD discipline, engineering craftsmanship practices, and demonstrated full-stack delivery across multiple production systems make him a credible senior-level contributor. The main gaps are the absence of explicit Nest.js, Vitest, Playwright, Kotlin, or Python experience in the resume, and no mention of PostgreSQL, which are meaningful given the stated primary stack.
strengths: Active AI-agent and MCP tooling work at re:cinq directly satisfies the AI agent development requirement — a differentiator few candidates will have
Deep TypeScript/Node.js + React production experience spanning multiple senior roles with real scale (millions of requests/sec at Sociomantic, millions of mailings at Optilyz)
Strong testing culture: TDD practitioner, author of a D-language assertion library, workshop instructor — signals the kind of quality focus the role requires
concerns: Nest.js is absent from the resume entirely, yet it anchors the primary backend stack — unclear whether there is transferable NestJS-adjacent knowledge or a real ramp-up cost
Kotlin, Vitest, Playwright, and Python are all listed as required or secondary skills with zero mention in the resume; the coverage gaps across the stated stack are wider than one or two items
Location header says Lagos, Nigeria while all employment history is European/Berlin-based — could be a data entry artifact, but worth a quick clarification to avoid downstream surprises
